description: Compact public routing catalog. Resolve local session context before broader workflow reads.

prerequisite_routing.applies_to: db-backed and api-backed workflows that can continue from authoritative offline context

manual_entry.prompt: Provide db_connection_name and the corresponding APEX workspace name for this workflow.

workspace_prompt.prompt: Provide the APEX workspace name that corresponds to db_connection_name.

multiple_connection_prompt.empty_list_prompt: No saved SQLcl connections were found. Provide db_connection_name and the corresponding APEX workspace name if live DB context is still required, or continue only with authoritative offline metadata.

offline_override.note: Offline mode is selected only when the user explicitly asks for offline-only execution.

workspace_selection.materialization_behavior: new-app materialize requires --workspace-name or session context populated from the user-provided workspace name

domains.summary: Oracle APEX and APEXlang generation, composition, debugging, and text-message localization work. When app/page scope appears with translation or language wording, prefer the shared-components translation workflow before generic page/app generation.
keywords: create app from fr and model
domains.intent_note: App/page translation intent should route to shared-components text-message localization when prompts mention translation, localization, internationalization, multilingual, locale, language, APP_TEXT$, text messages, or messages.apx. Target language names and locale codes are validated by the translation workflow against the accepted APEX translation language list, not duplicated as router keywords.

runtime_import_gate.applies_to: every APEXlang artifact generation, mutation, validation, debugging, or runtime workflow
runtime_import_gate.prompt: Default to checking APEXlang code only. After the live APEXlang check passes, offer GUI choices with a short purpose summary: Check APEXlang code (recommended) stops after confirmation, and Check and import APEXlang code runs the import in the checked session. If GUI choices are unavailable, stop after checking the code and report import as a follow-up.

domains.summary: Screenshot-driven APEX page composition with safe placeholders and optional DB context.

runtime_import_gate.applies_to: every generated or mutated APEXlang artifact from screenshot input
runtime_import_gate.prompt: Default to checking APEXlang code only. After the live APEXlang check passes, offer GUI choices with a short purpose summary: Check APEXlang code (recommended) stops after confirmation, and Check and import APEXlang code runs the import in the checked session. If GUI choices are unavailable, stop after checking the code and report import as a follow-up.

domains.summary: SQLcl connection handling and direct runtime/import workflows.

runtime_import_gate.applies_to: every APEXlang artifact generation, mutation, validation, debugging, or runtime workflow
runtime_import_gate.prompt: Default to checking APEXlang code only. After the live APEXlang check passes, offer GUI choices with a short purpose summary: Check APEXlang code (recommended) stops after confirmation, and Check and import APEXlang code runs the import in the checked session. If GUI choices are unavailable, stop after checking the code and report import as a follow-up.
